series_metadata.series_description: Potential claims and court filed pleadings (documents may need to be redacted, ORC Section 149.43(B)(1), Public Records Act.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in-house one year after case is closed, and then forward to appropriate storage facility for an additional 5 years retention. ; Electronic: Retain in-house one year after case is closed, and then forward to appropriate storage facility for an additional 5 years retention., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
